name: Pasteli Me Fistikia (Pistachio & Honey Candy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and place the pistachios on a baking sheet.
2. Put in a slow oven (250°F) to roast for 20 minutes.
3. Remove from the oven and cut into quarters.
4. Meanwhile, combine sugar, honey, and water in a heavy pan.
5. Stir over medium heat until dissolved.
6. Lower the heat and boil to the very firm stage (250-256°F).
7. Toss in the pistachio nuts and stir; remove from the heat.
8. Butter or oil a marble slab, jelly roll, or any aluminum pan.
9. Quickly spread the candy using a spatula or knife.
10. Allow to cool, cut into squares, and store in covered containers.
